goal: Two workstreams: (1) Runtime optimization stabilization on merged rspack stack, (2) Rspack follow-up hardening

runtime_optimizations.status: IN PROGRESS — merged with master rspack migration; final offline/UX/sign-off and stability hardening pending
commits: 158e60988 — perf(workspace-ui): ~100x faster time-to-first-render via progressive query loading
4f9195ebf — fix(workspace-overview): refresh env icon when heavy query resolves
uncommitted_changes: Move compositions to light query (previews unblocked from GQL)
Fix triple remount cascade (no blank flash on server URL arrival)
Shimmer loading placeholder (beautiful UX while dev servers compile)
Increased virtual scroll overscan (5 rows, smoother scrolling)
Start command pre-start compilation no longer blocks UI readiness
UI server starts first; preview plugins initiate after UI startup
Cloud user-bar offline indicator with fade-out recovery
GraphQL + preview iframe connectivity event wiring
runtime_optimizations.focus: Offline-resilient instant UI with correct server-status semantics

rspack_migration.focus: Follow-up hardening only (no bootstrap migration work)
todo: Verify offline refresh + auto-recovery on merged rspack path
Validate cross-workspace SW/cache isolation under parallel Bit runs
Continue env-level rspack perf hardening only where still needed

current_experiment: Stabilize preview compile-state with canonical env IDs and server.isCompiling source-of-truth

start_output_bootstrap_feedback_2026_02_.summary: Added staged preview-bootstrap terminal feedback so users see immediate progress between UI-ready and first preview compile events.
implementation: PreviewStartPlugin now shows immediate bootstrap spinner states (preparing runtime, creating dev servers, waiting for compilation).
Bootstrap spinner transitions to success when first compile starts and fails explicitly on bootstrap errors.

startup_gap_root_cause_2026_02_11.summary: Identified and fixed the fundamental startup-gap cause: runtime was still executing stale dist with sequential plugin initiation behind uiServer.dev().
implementation: Compiled teambit.ui-foundation/ui so node_modules dist now uses parallel startup (initiatePlugins invoked before awaiting uiServer.dev).
Compiled teambit.preview/preview and improved bootstrap stage text to explicitly show workspace component-loading stage and timings.
Validated start output now shows preview bootstrap activity immediately (no silent gap), with remaining latency isolated to component discovery.

validation.compile: bit compile teambit.ui-foundation/ui && bit compile teambit.preview/preview

start_output_overlap_fix_2026_02_11.summary: Resolved terminal line-overlap corruption (`Rspack compiled successfully` + spinner suffix) by removing animated bootstrap spinner updates during preview bootstrap.
implementation: Preview bootstrap progress now logs stable stage lines via logger.console instead of active multiSpinner updates.
Kept per-env compile spinners intact; only bootstrap stage changed to avoid concurrent cursor-control writes.

preview_state_from_workspace_2026_02_11.summary: Moved preview presence/readiness source-of-truth to useWorkspace lifecycle to align user-bar state with dev-server compile reality.
implementation: useWorkspace now emits keyed preview presence and readiness events derived from component list (`compositions`) and `server.url` availability.
PreviewPlaceholder no longer emits duplicate preview presence events (single source of truth avoids race/double-count behavior).

preview_state_semantics_2026_02_11.summary: Resolved online-vs-compiling mismatch by moving from aggregate preview booleans to keyed expected/ready tracking.
implementation: ComponentPreview now emits preview connectivity events with stable previewKey.
PreviewPlaceholder emits preview presence (+/-) with previewKey even before iframe hydration (captures compile windows).
User-bar connection hook now computes preview mode from presence/ready key sets and only reports online when all expected previews are ready.

skeleton_layout_fidelity_2026_02_11.summary: Reworked loading placeholders to match real layout geometry instead of centered blocks.
implementation: Workspace overview loading now uses inline status row + native filter/header/grid skeleton flow aligned to real page layout.
Component page loading/error states now render top-aligned status row and full-width skeleton layout instead of centered card shell.
Preview iframe/card placeholders now render structured chrome/canvas skeletons aligned to real preview composition area.

validation.compile: bit compile teambit.workspace/workspace teambit.component/component teambit.preview/ui/component-preview teambit.preview/ui/preview-placeholder

status_backend_rollback_2026_02_11.summary: Removed backend GraphQL/status-loader optimizations in workspace status path after status rendering regression.
implementation: Reverted Workspace GraphQL status-path resolver optimizations (status-only selection-set shortcut removed).
Reverted ComponentStatusLoader local changes in status loader path.

preview_status_stability_2026_02_11.summary: Fixed preview status/event fan-out and hardened user-bar connection-state transitions.
implementation: Scoped preview postMessage handling to each preview's own iframe window (prevented cross-preview readiness/connection contamination).
Added preview presence signals from preview placeholders so user-bar can represent 'previews loading' during compile windows.
Added two-strike offline transition guard for main dev health checks to reduce online/offline flap on transient transport errors.

loading_shell_alignment_2026_02_11.summary: Reworked workspace and component loading shells to mirror final layout geometry and reduce visual jump on hydration.
implementation: Workspace overview shell now uses sectioned skeleton grids with realistic card geometry (title, preview area, footer tags) and responsive centering.
Component loading shell now matches component page hierarchy (header/meta, preview region, tab row, side panels) with responsive scaling.

rspack_migration.approach: Replace webpack with rspack for att-react preview + UI server
rspack_migration.status: MERGED TO MASTER + MERGED INTO perf/runtime-optimizations (verified compile/startup)

runtime_three_query_split.approach: Three-query progressive loading: light (instant) → heavy (fast) → status (deferred)
runtime_three_query_split.notes: Light query gives full component list. Heavy adds aspects/descriptions. Status is deferred.

instant_ui_changes.status: VERIFIED IN BUILD + LOCAL REBUILD — final browser UX sign-off pending
instant_ui_changes.ui_server_start: __bd start reports UI ready immediately; pre-start compilation moved to background
instant_ui_changes.approach: Startup path decoupling, cloud user-bar offline indicator, preview/graphql connectivity events, fallback hardening, service worker wiring
instant_ui_changes.notes: Compiled teambit.ui-foundation/ui + teambit.workspace/workspace + teambit.harmony/graphql; rebuilt dev-server-test app shell (chunk 510.5fa69646.js, workbox-895dea98.js). Emitted SW now uses NetworkFirst navigation route (no NavigationRoute/createHandlerBoundToURL), and chunk no longer contains cjs asset-module crash pattern; final process-down refresh UX still needs user sign-off.

merge_master_runtime_checkpoint.head: 7b9a59e0f
merge_master_runtime_checkpoint.summary: Merged master rspack migration and ported runtime hardening to rspack paths; compile validated; startup smoke passed without plugin-react-refresh missing-module error

runtime_stabilization_2026_02_10b.summary: Patched HMR upgrade routing, hardened Apollo connection reporter, accelerated sidebar lane/workspace query path, and isolated SW caches by workspace hash.

smoke.result: UI server ready instantly on 3101; full browser-loop verification still required for HMR reconnect and offline refresh UX.

focus_next: Measure sidebar load time and lane/component query timings before/after on dev-server-test2 vs dev-server-test
Interactive browser verification for HMR reconnect without manual hard refresh
Interactive browser verification for offline refresh shell behavior and status indicator transitions

graphql_startup_contention_2026_02_10.conclusion: Status resolver contention is the dominant startup blocker. Deferring status and using minimal drawer lanes query removes 12-13s startup stalls for sidebar-critical queries.

minimal_mode_status_skip_2026_02_10.summary: Disabled deferred workspace status query in minimal mode to remove unnecessary backend load and startup contention.

implementation.behavior: status pipeline (readiness gate + chunked fetch) is bypassed when minimal mode is active

runtime_hmr_offline_preview_checkpoint_2.summary: Patched HMR proxy activation race, decode-safe env-id path matching, enabled dev-mode SW offline shell, and increased preview hydration throughput + virtualizer compatibility fallback.

smoke.result: UI server reached ready quickly; no immediate terminal startup crash. Full browser verification remains required for HMR reconnect loops and offline-refresh UX sign-off.

focus_next: Browser-validate that _hmr websocket loops are gone after preview-server restart cycles
Browser-validate refresh while dev server is down renders cached shell + offline state (no blank)
Measure preview first-wave load timings after hydration concurrency/auto-warm changes

component_route_menu_prefetch_2026_02_11.summary: Component page no longer eagerly fetches version logs; dropdown logs are prefetched on hover/focus/open intent.

api_probe.note: Cold-start numbers captured during dev-server warmup indicate logs are substantially slower than core component payload.

behavior_change: use-component-query/use-component-logs use Apollo useQuery with cache-and-network + cache-first follow-up
logs are opt-in (fetched only when menu/version workflow requests them)
version dropdown remains interactive when hasMoreVersions is unknown and prefetches logs on intent
component_route_menu_prefetch_2026_02_11.status: IMPLEMENTED + COMPILED; browser UX sign-off pending

component_menu_versions_followup_2026_02.summary: Version dropdown now indicates availability before logs resolve and uses component.tags for immediate menu data while keeping logs lazy.
behavior: hasMoreVersions hint derived from lightweight component metadata
tag versions rendered from component.tags before log hydration
dropdown indicator visible when version count is unknown (hasMoreVersions !== false)

graphql_resolver_perf_2026_02_11.summary: Reduced workspace status query latency using minimal status loader path and resolver-level request caching.
backend_changes: workspace.graphql status-only selection uses ws.list(loadExtensions:false, executeLoadSlot:false)
workspace.graphql status resolver caches per request and computes autoTag pending set once
component-status-loader uses workspace.getLegacyMinimal(id) fast path before heavy consumer.loadComponents fallback
frontend_changes: component menu versions path uses lightweight metadata query (id/package/latest/tags/buildStatus)
logs stay lazy and prefetch on intent

ux_stability_userbar_preview_2026_02_11.summary: Stabilized user-bar online/offline transitions and added consistent shimmer loading for iframe previews while improving virtual row positioning stability.
changes: user-bar connection hook now debounces network-origin offline transitions and verifies local /graphql before switching offline
ComponentPreview now renders a shimmer placeholder until iframe readiness and falls back cleanly during rebuild/error
workspace overview retained virtual rows now reuse last measured starts instead of static estimates

runtime_ui_stability_2026_02_11.summary: Removed ResizeObserver suppression and row re-measure loops, stabilized user-bar connection transitions, and added shared iframe loading skeleton across preview surfaces.
implementation: workspace virtual grid switched to fixed-size/no-measure path with RAF-throttled ResizeObserver updates
workspace overview no longer attaches virtualizer.measureElement refs to rows
user-bar connection hook adds debounced offline confirmation + post-recovery offline guard window
user-bar now supports persistent online indicator tone
component-preview renders shimmer skeleton until iframe readiness

sidebar_first_paint_jitter_2026_02_11.summary: Removed per-node mounted state from sidebar ComponentView to eliminate immediate second render wave on initial paint.
implementation: component-view removed useState/useEffect mounted flip
env URL and localhost flags are now derived from typeof window checks without state updates
sidebar_first_paint_jitter_2026_02_11.dist_verification: @teambit/ui-foundation.ui.side-bar dist no longer contains mounted/setMounted in component-view output
sidebar_first_paint_jitter_2026_02_11.status: IMPLEMENTED + COMPILED + LINKED; browser sign-off pending

workspace_overview_shell_ux_2026_02_11.summary: Redesigned workspace overview boot shell with explicit state pill, reconnect action, and skeleton card grid for loading/offline periods.
implementation: workspace-overview adds boot-shell component for empty+loading and empty+offline states
offline reason handling differentiates browser-offline from server-unavailable
manual retry action runs graphql health probe
new responsive shimmer skeleton grid keeps page non-blank while startup progresses
workspace_overview_shell_ux_2026_02_11.status: IMPLEMENTED + COMPILED + LINKED; browser sign-off pending

no_blank_offline_shells_2026_02_11.summary: Eliminated virtualized overview first-paint empty frame, introduced graceful component offline/loading shell, and improved preview slow-load messaging while preserving placeholders.
implementation: workspace-overview virtualized render now has retained/live/fallback row indexes to avoid empty frames
workspace-overview spacing tuned for filter/header/card gaps
component route uses styled loading/offline shell with retry (non-404 errors)
preview placeholder now escalates to explicit waiting-for-dev-server copy on slow loads
no_blank_offline_shells_2026_02_11.status: IMPLEMENTED + COMPILED + LINKED; browser sign-off pending

runtime_reload_resize_hardening_2026_02_.summary: Removed SW controller-change forced reload behavior and fixed preview size observer measurement loop path.
implementation: html.ts: disabled forced reload on service-worker controllerchange and stale-controller cleanup path
preview.preview.runtime.tsx: removed style-mutation-based size measurement inside ResizeObserver callback
preview.preview.runtime.tsx: added observer/debounce/raf cleanup before re-registering size observer
runtime_reload_resize_hardening_2026_02_.status: IMPLEMENTED + COMPILED + LINKED; browser validation pending

dev_reload_loop_guard_2026_02_11.summary: Added safeReload guard in webpack hot client and top-level __BIT_DISABLE_DEV_AUTO_RELOAD__ flag in rspack HTML bootstrap.
implementation: webpackHotDevClient now uses safeReload() with top-level disable flag + 15s throttle
rspack html sets window.__BIT_DISABLE_DEV_AUTO_RELOAD__=true for workspace UI shell
dev_reload_loop_guard_2026_02_11.status: IMPLEMENTED + COMPILED + LINKED; browser verification pending

status_source_of_truth_revert_2026_02_11.summary: Reverted ComponentStatusLoader getLegacyMinimal fast path and switched GraphQL Component.status resolver to wsComponent.getStatus().

dev_profile_reload_cache_hardening_2026_.summary: Made dev service-worker assets network-first and disabled browser caching for mutable /static/js|css bundles in rspack dev server.
dev_profile_reload_cache_hardening_2026_.status: IMPLEMENTED + COMPILED + LINKED; browser verification pending

startup_gap_dx_heartbeat_2026_02_11.summary: Improved CLI startup DX so users always see progress during long preview bootstrap phases.
implementation: Added runBootstrapStage() heartbeat wrapper in preview.start-plugin with elapsed-time updates.
Applied staged progress labels across bootstrap phases (workspace components, env runtimes, environment creation).
Added per-stage completion timing logs to reduce silent gaps and clarify forward progress.

validation.observed: UI ready quickly; preview bootstrap emits periodic elapsed-time progress during component-loading gap.

startup_gap_dx_heartbeat_2026_02_11.scope: Underlying 20-30s delay is now isolated to workspace component loading path and should be handled as a dedicated deeper optimization stream.

component_status_loader_rollback_2026_02.summary: Reverted remaining loader optimizations tied to component status-loader experiments.
kept: preview start DX staged progress logs

preview_iframe_runtime_tuning_2026_02_11.summary: Applied dev-safe preview iframe runtime optimizations to reduce network/main-thread pressure and improve perceived preview readiness.
changes: Adaptive hydration concurrency in preview-placeholder (4/6/8 based on hardwareConcurrency).
Visibility-prioritized hydration queue and reduced eager offscreen warmup pressure.
Paint-boundary iframe navigation scheduling (rAF + setTimeout) in component-preview.
srcdoc in-iframe skeleton before navigation and fade-in on ready.
preview_iframe_runtime_tuning_2026_02_11.notes: Browser-level perf verification for large (200+) preview grids still required to quantify latency reductions.

preview_loading_state_regressions_fix_20.summary: Fixed stuck previews-loading user-bar state and composition-switch skeleton regressions while simplifying component overview loading shell.
changes: use-workspace emits previewSnapshot and writes window.__BIT_PREVIEW_STATUS__ for late-listener hydration.
user-bar hook applies snapshot sync and ignores unknown ad-hoc preview signal keys.
component-preview keeps previous src across URL transitions and only resets readiness on first load/preview-key change.
component page loading skeleton no longer uses window-like top chrome.

validation.compile: bit compile teambit.cloud/ui/user-bar teambit.workspace/workspace teambit.component/component teambit.preview/ui/component-preview

preview_loading_state_regressions_fix_20.next: Browser verification required for user-bar state transitions and composition switching UX under real navigation flows.

preview_status_transition_hardening_2026.summary: Fixed preview status online/loading stuck transitions by making workspace snapshot authoritative, hardening server-start parsing, and adding reconcile refetch while previews pending.
implementation: use-workspace now emits previewSnapshot only and stores __BIT_PREVIEW_STATUS__ for late listener hydration.
use-workspace now polls refetch while expected preview servers exceed ready servers to self-heal missed startup events.
componentServerStarted subscription consumer now accepts array/object payload shape.
user-bar preview status consumes snapshot as source-of-truth and ignores keyed per-iframe online/offline event noise.
preview start plugin removed deprecated SubscribeToWebpackEvents listener.
component-preview navigation scheduling simplified to RAF-only.

validation.compile: bit compile teambit.workspace/workspace teambit.cloud/ui/user-bar teambit.preview/preview teambit.preview/ui/component-preview
validation.result: success (compile/link), smoke startup observed; browser transition sign-off pending

preview_compilation_status_rspack_events.summary: Wired compiler lifecycle events to UI status snapshots so user-bar reflects real preview compiling state and transitions smoothly.
implementation: Added GraphQL subscription componentServerCompilationChanged in bundler schema/events.
PreviewStartPlugin publishes compile start/done status from onStart/onDone hooks.
useWorkspace tracks per-env compiling state and emits previewSnapshot with compilingKeys.
useDevServerConnectionStatus now uses compilingKeys as loading authority and adds small online settle + boot snapshot wait.

validation.compile: bit compile teambit.compilation/bundler teambit.preview/preview teambit.workspace/workspace teambit.cloud/ui/user-bar
validation.schema_probe: curl POST /graphql introspection confirms componentServerCompilationChanged subscription

preview_compile_mapping_root_fix_2026_02.summary: Fixed incorrect online/loading transitions by mapping compiler events to component env IDs via affectedEnvs.
implementation: componentServerCompilationChanged now exposes affectedEnvs in GraphQL.
PreviewStartPlugin publishes affectedEnvs from context.id + relatedContexts.
useWorkspace applies compile state to all affected env IDs and marks preview ready only when server.url exists and env is not compiling.
useWorkspace no longer emits empty snapshots before workspace data exists.

preview_compile_state_source_of_truth_20.summary: Fixed stuck "Previews loading" and incorrect online/loading transitions by removing compile heuristics and wiring compile state to canonical env IDs and server.isCompiling.
implementation: PreviewStartPlugin now resolves compiler event IDs to canonical envRuntime IDs and publishes componentServerCompilationChanged with canonical env + affectedEnvs.
PreviewStartPlugin now updates ComponentServer.isCompiling on start/done and initializes new servers as compiling=true.
dev-server GraphQL server field now exposes isCompiling and compilation-changed subscription payload is consumed by workspace UI.

useWorkspace now updates component.server fields from server-started + compilation-changed subscriptions and derives preview snapshots from component.server.isCompiling (startup guard and compile-map heuristics removed).
ComponentPreview no longer marks ready on bare iframe onLoad fallback; readiness stays tied to preview runtime LOAD_EVENT/preview-size messages.

known_bugs.description: Startup auto-refresh loop in dev due to unstable service-worker registration token
known_bugs.status: MITIGATED — SW reload loop removed in html.ts and compiled; requires browser sign-off

known_bugs.description: Component menu versions/logs can feel slow if logs are fetched only after dropdown click
known_bugs.status: FIXED IN CODE — early version hints + non-blocking tag data + lazy logs intent-prefetch

known_bugs.description: ResizeObserver loop errors in workspace overview virtual grid
known_bugs.status: MITIGATED — preview/runtime ResizeObserver root-cause patched (no style mutation in observer callback); browser sign-off pending

lessons_learned: useDataQuery = useQuery + useLoader(loading) — triggers global LoaderRibbon
Apollo BatchHttpLink blocks ALL queries until slowest completes — disable by default
queueMicrotask timing bug: cleanup runs BEFORE promise continuations — don't use for cache invalidation
Per David First: status slowness is from loading components, not checking status — don't parallelize
Don't blindly add optimizations — measure before and after, verify in browser
Source changes in __bit/scopes/ must be compiled to produce dist files
Runtime loads from node_modules/@teambit/*/dist/ NOT from source
New exports must be added to aspect's index.ts before they're available
HtmlRspackPlugin strips inline scripts — use external <script src> tags
Express middleware: unshift() for priority over historyApiFallback
watchOptions poll: true exists for Docker/NFS/VM — don't change without testing
THREE remount layers caused blank flash: toggle useEffect, key={serverKey}, key={name-serverUrl-forceRender}
PreviewPlaceholder/ComponentComposition/ComponentPreview don't need key remounting — iframe src changes naturally
StartPlugin.initiate() returns void but implementation is async — can fire-and-forget safely
SSR RenderPlugin.browserInit can return Promise — triggerBrowserInit uses Promise.all()
compositions field is lightweight (just identifier strings) — safe to move to light query
serverUrlsSignature in plugins memo caused ALL cards to re-render when ANY server URL changed
WDS proxy entries are STATIC — set at creation time via getProxy(), must call AFTER initiate() creates servers
cache-and-network serves stale server.url from localStorage on restart — use network-only with cache persistence
UI startup decoupling works when plugin initialization is moved after UI server startup and routed through catch-all preview/HMR proxies
`bit start` perceived speed improves significantly when pre-start compilation runs in background instead of blocking server startup
Guard history fallbacks so asset requests (js/css/map/hot-update) are never rewritten to index.html
Workspace UI runs React 17 — startTransition is React 18+ only
Do not rely on forward(...).map in Apollo links; use a subscribe-based Observable wrapper for transport compatibility.
Never close /_hmr/* sockets in the generic upgrade handler before dynamic component proxy handlers run.
For workspace sidebar first paint, treat URL lane state as authoritative and skip lanes network query when no lane is in URL.
HMR proxy active state must be derived from actual compile state; startup event ordering can otherwise leave _hmr permanently offline.
Proxy path matching must decode URI-encoded env ids (e.g. %40) before context comparison.
Dev-mode offline refresh requires a dedicated SW strategy; disabling SW in dev guarantees blank refresh when local server is down.
